title: espeletia × rodriguezii
intro: Espeletia × rodriguezii, also known as 'Rodriguez Espetia', is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is native to the Andes mountain range in South America, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, offering benefits like reduced pain and inflammation, and improved immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused oil, and is also used in some folk remedies to treat wounds and promote healing.
